caption: A person wearing a dark jacket and a watch on their left wrist is seated at a dark desk, working with various tools. The jacket features a logo and text that reads "LEV L RIGHT" and "FLOOR UNDERLAYMENT". The individual uses a yellow pencil in their right hand to write on a white notebook, while their left hand holds a small white card. In the foreground, a white calculator with grey buttons sits on the desk surface. Across the sequence of frames, the person remains in a consistent position, making slight movements with their hands as they write and refer to the card. The camera angle remains static, providing a close-up view of the desk and the person's hands, with the background showing a dimly lit indoor setting.
